content: TASK-078 checkpoint done: strengthened Prototype map dragging. Map drag now starts during capture on the flow pane, listens for pointermove on both pane and window while active, keeps pointerup/pointercancel cleanup on window, and disables text/native drag on map cards. Verification: npm run typecheck, npm test -- --run test/prototype.test.ts test/render.test.ts, npm run build. Browser automation could not verify the file:// page because the in-app browser policy blocks file URL interaction; use manual file/localhost smoke next.
